news.title: 3 Defense Stocks Under $20 With Massive Upside
news.body: Small-cap defense stocks trading under $20 offer investors exposure to fast-growing areas such as military drones, battlefield connectivity, and next-generation batteries.

news.title: GOP 'big beautiful bill' poised to deliver 'shock' to ACA marketplace, health policy experts say
news.body: A series of policy changes in the so-called " big beautiful bill " are undermining the Affordable Care Act marketplace, in ways that may at first seem relatively subtle but which add up to a major change, health policy experts say.

news.title: India’s Social Stock Exchange just got a hat-trick IPO
